allowed_uses: record bot family, symbol, visible parameters, and timestamped public metadata
propose offline strategy hypotheses for canonical reconstruction
compare reconstructed rules only after local validation evidence exists
bias_risks: shared parameters may not reproduce across market regimes
exchange UI may hide execution details needed for local replay
notes: Capture is metadata-only until source terms and replay mechanics are reviewed.
No Binance account, API key, copy action, or bot creation is allowed in S2.

bot_family.value: Spot Grid, Futures Grid, Arbitrage Bot, Rebalancing Bot, Spot DCA, Spot Algo Orders, Futures TWAP, and Futures VP are visible bot families.

copy_or_create_controls_present.value: Public UI advertises discovering and replicating strategies and may show copy, create, register, or login controls.

fee_and_slippage_disclaimer.value: Pair pages may display profit-per-grid after fees; exact fee tier and slippage assumptions remain account/context specific.

symbol_or_market.value: Public surface separates All, Spot, and Futures, with Hot Coin Leaderboard, Available Coins, Volatility, and Daily Picks sections.

visible_parameters.value: Public bot marketplace exposes family/market metadata; pair-specific pages may expose shared/manual parameter controls, but account-specific values remain out of scope.

validation_prerequisites: canonical strategy spec or explicit non-spec replay record
frozen-data backtest on approved instruments and timeframes
G10 multiple-testing evidence before any promotion claim
